hooks.command: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python3 -m black $file --quiet 2>/dev/null && echo '[hook] ✓ black: formatted' || echo '[hook] ⚠ black: install with pip3 install black'
python3 -m mypy $file --ignore-missing-imports --no-error-summary --quiet 2>/dev/null && echo '[hook] ✓ mypy: types OK' || echo '[hook] ⚠ mypy: type issues found (non-blocking)'

ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && MODEL=$(basename $file .sql) && cd $ROOT/dbt && dbt compile --select $MODEL --quiet 2>&1; RC=$?; [ $RC -eq 0 ] && echo '[hook] dbt compile: OK' || (echo '[hook] dbt compile: ERRORS — fix before running' && exit 1)
python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('$file').read()); print('[hook] ✓ DAG syntax: valid')" 2>/dev/null || echo '[hook] ✗ DAG syntax: ERROR — check file'

python3 -c "import importlib.util,sys; spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('s','$file'); m=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(m); print('[hook] ✓ Pydantic schema: importable')" 2>/dev/null || echo '[hook] ✗ Pydantic schema: import error'
docker-compose -f $file config --quiet 2>/dev/null && echo '[hook] ✓ docker-compose: valid YAML' || echo '[hook] ✗ docker-compose: invalid — check syntax'

ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && python3 $ROOT/scripts/validate/check_credentials.py; RC=$?; [ $RC -eq 0 ] && echo '[hook] Security: clean' || (echo '[hook] BLOCKED: credential found' && exit 1)

ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && cd $ROOT/dbt && dbt compile --quiet 2>&1; RC=$?; [ $RC -eq 0 ] && echo '[hook] Pre-run compile: OK' || (echo '[hook] Compile errors — fix before dbt run' && exit 1)
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && python3 $ROOT/scripts/context/context_manager.py session-end 2>/dev/null || echo '[context] Update MEMORY.md manually before closing'
